title: Rhipidoglossum schimperianum
taxonomy: Rhipidoglossum schimperianum is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Rhipidoglossum, which is a group of orchids native to tropical Africa. The plant is further classified as a member of the subtribe Angraecinae. This classification places it within the tribe Vandeae, a large and diverse group of orchids. The species is native to a specific region of tropical Africa.
